title: Kharik Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kharik, with a Z-Score of +3.40. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kharik is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 72%, and the wind speed is 7.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Kharik.
